roles.title: Senior FP&A Manager, AI & Automation
highlights: Established and leads the Finance AI Process Automation function
Architecting lightweight HTML applications and AI-driven forecasting agents across Oracle Cloud ERP
Built end-to-end AI-driven P&L forecasting agents using Claude Code spanning ARR, cost of revenue, and operating expenses with embedded variance analysis and automated executive-ready commentary
Reengineered enterprise headcount forecasting integrating HR and ERP data into governed framework with rule-based variance logic
Designed standardized AI-driven variance and P&L narrative consolidation platform
Transformed CAPEX forecasting and fixed asset workflows through Salesforce pipeline integration
Launched AI-driven competitor benchmarking analytics to synthesize peer performance into structured leadership insights for capital allocation and GTM strategy

Spearheaded quarterly flash reporting to C-suite
Consolidated 6 international P&Ls and Annual Operating Plans into unified global structure
Managed and mentored a high-performing team
Architecting multi-phase AI transformation roadmap for FP&A operations
